targetIdentity.style: mainstream Japanese RPG mature academy heroine
targetIdentity.silhouette: 172 cm mature big-sister NPC with long burgundy hair, elegant posture, fitted ivory camisole top, lavender double side-slit skirt, and Roman-style strappy high-heeled sandals
facePriorities: soft mature anime eyes with purple iris color
clean face planes suitable for dialogue close-ups
hairPriorities: separated hair chunks for secondary motion
outfitPriorities: ivory fitted camisole-style top with thin gold straps and gold trim
small gold choker with purple gem pendant
lavender high-waist skirt with double side slits
gold star accents near slits and hem
ivory and gold Roman-style strappy high-heeled sandals

acceptanceGate: front silhouette matches v7 concept sheet
face remains mature and elegant instead of generic childlike anime
hair, top, skirt, legs, hands, and sandals are separable enough for retopology
texture atlas keeps the ivory, lavender, burgundy, purple, and gold palette
mesh can be retopologized and rigged without losing identity
